packs.title: Modern SaaS Landing
packs.description: Clean, professional SaaS landing page with hero, features grid, pricing cards, and CTA. Built with Inter font and indigo accent color.

packs.title: Portfolio — Minimal
packs.description: Dark, elegant portfolio page with project grid, about section, skills, timeline, and contact links. Space Grotesk typography.

packs.title: Studio — Creative Agency
packs.description: Bold, editorial creative agency page with services list, work showcase, client logos, and marquee animation. Playfair Display serif headings.

packs.title: Open Doodles Style
packs.description: Hand-drawn character illustrations in the Open Doodles style. Happy, thinking, waving, and dancing characters for playful UI designs.

packs.title: Minimal Textures
packs.description: Subtle background textures for modern UI. Paper grain, mesh gradients, dark noise, and dot patterns.

packs.title: Abstract Video Loops
packs.description: Short, reusable video clips for design projects. Gradient flows, particle drifts, and wave animations.

packs.title: Open Peeps Style
packs.description: Diverse character illustrations in the Open Peeps mix-and-match style. 8 characters with varied skin tones, poses, and outfits for inclusive UI design.

packs.title: unDraw Tech
packs.description: Minimal tech illustrations for SaaS and developer products. Dashboard, code, team, upload, migration, and success states.

packs.title: Micro Interactions
packs.description: Pure CSS animations for loading states, feedback, and delight. 13 self-contained keyframe animations with no JavaScript.

packs.title: Typography Pairings
packs.description: 6 curated serif + sans-serif font combinations for modern UI. Each pairing includes Google Fonts links and usage examples.

packs.title: Color Palettes
packs.description: 6 curated 5-color systems with CSS custom properties. Atelier Zero, Midnight SaaS, Terracotta Studio, Soft Mint, Neon Dark, Sunbleached.

packs.title: UI Components
packs.description: Self-contained HTML/CSS buttons, cards, forms, and modals. Drop-in components with modern styling and interactive states.

packs.title: Navigation Components
packs.description: Essential navigation patterns — navbar, sidebar, breadcrumbs, and tab bar. Responsive with hover and active states.

packs.title: Footer Components
packs.description: Essential footer patterns — simple, multi-column, and editorial. Responsive with social links and legal sections.

packs.title: Form Components
packs.description: Input fields, textareas, selects, checkboxes, and validation states. Clean, accessible form patterns.

packs.title: Hero Sections
packs.description: 4 hero patterns for landing pages — centered, split, gradient, and dark grid. Responsive with CTAs.

packs.title: Pricing Tables
packs.description: 3 pricing patterns — tiered cards, feature comparison table, and horizontal layout. Responsive with highlighted plans.

packs.title: Social Proof
packs.description: Testimonials, logo bars, stats counters, and review cards. Build trust with social proof patterns.

packs.title: Layout Grids
packs.description: 4 responsive grid patterns — masonry, dashboard, split view, and card grid. Flexible layouts for any project.

packs.title: CTA Banners
packs.description: 3 call-to-action patterns — gradient, minimal, and newsletter signup. Responsive with dual buttons.

packs.title: Open Design Landing
packs.description: Single-file editorial landing page. All CSS inlined. Drop one file, get a full page with warm paper aesthetic, coral accents, and editorial typography.

packs.title: Dashboard — Admin Panel
packs.description: Full admin dashboard with dark sidebar, stat cards, weekly revenue chart, recent activity feed, and orders table. Space Grotesk typography.

packs.title: E-Commerce — Product Browse
packs.description: Clean e-commerce product listing page with sidebar filters, product card grid, hero banner, and pagination. Instrument Sans typography.

packs.title: Magazine — Blog Home
packs.description: Editorial blog homepage with featured story card, article grid, topic pills, newsletter signup. Newsreader serif typography with paper texture.

packs.title: Authentication — Sign In / Sign Up
packs.description: Dark-themed login page with split layout, brand panel with quote, email + password form, social sign-in buttons, and tabbed auth switching.

packs.title: Modal & Dialog Patterns
packs.description: 3 dialog patterns — confirmation, form modal, and info overlay. Click-triggered with backdrop blur and smooth transitions.

packs.title: Accordion, Tabs & Stepper
packs.description: Interactive UI patterns: pill and line tab variants, accordion FAQ with smooth expand/collapse, and a multi-step wizard with navigation.

packs.title: Data Table Patterns
packs.description: 3 table variants — standard with search and pagination, compact inventory view, and striped transaction log. Sortable headers and status badges.

packs.title: Geometric Patterns
packs.description: 6 repeating SVG geometric patterns — chevron, hexagon, dot grid, diagonal stripes, crosshatch, and triangles. For backgrounds and decorative use.

packs.title: Blob Shapes
packs.description: 6 organic SVG blob shapes in warm, blue, green, pink, amber, and neutral tones. Perfect for hero backgrounds, section dividers, and decorative accents.

packs.title: Abstract Illustrations
packs.description: 6 minimalist abstract SVG illustrations — floating orbs, geometric frames, fluid wave, signal bars, nested pentagon, and constellation dot pattern.

packs.title: Lumina — App Showcase Landing
packs.description: Dark-themed app landing page with hero, feature grid, testimonials, pricing, and app mockup. Inter + DM Serif Display typography.

packs.title: 404 — Page Not Found
packs.description: Creative 404 error page with large serif typography, warm paper background, and contextual navigation links. Instrument Sans + Serif.

packs.title: Contact — Get in Touch
packs.description: Clean contact page with info cards, contact form with validation-ready fields, and social links. Playfair Display + Inter typography.

packs.title: FAQ — Help Center
packs.description: Help center page with search bar, category cards, expandable FAQ accordion with smooth animations, and support CTA. Outfit + Lexend typography.

packs.title: Notifications & Toasts
packs.description: 4 toast notification types (success, error, info, warning) with slide-in animations and auto-dismiss, plus an inline banner variant.

packs.title: Loading Indicators
packs.description: 7 loading patterns: ring spinner, bouncing dots, pulse ring, bar loader, rotating dots, skeleton screen, and animated progress bar.

packs.title: Search & Filter Components
packs.description: Search bar with keyboard shortcut hint, filter chip variants, active filter tags, tag input with removable chips, and range slider.

packs.title: Profile Cards
packs.description: 3 profile card variants: vertical with tags and actions, horizontal for side-by-side layouts, and minimal for compact grids.

packs.title: Gradient Meshes
packs.description: 6 vibrant gradient backgrounds — twilight purple, pink bloom, cyan lagoon, green mint, coral sunset, and lavender. CSS gradients ready to use.

packs.title: Line Art Icons
packs.description: 12 essential SVG line icons on a 24×24 grid with 1.5px stroke: clock, layers, heart, target, folder, search, download, edit, bookmark, package, history, users.

packs.title: Team & Culture Page
packs.description: Warm team page with remote-first hero, company values with colored icons, 8-person team grid with avatars and bios, stat counters, and careers CTA. DM Serif Display + Inter typography.

packs.title: Pricing — Standalone Page
packs.description: Full pricing page with monthly/yearly toggle, 3 tier cards with Most Popular highlight, feature comparison table, and interactive price switching. Inter typeface on dark theme.

packs.title: Coming Soon — Waitlist
packs.description: Pre-launch coming soon page with animated grid background, live countdown timer, email waitlist form with join button, avatar social proof showing 2,847 signups, and floating gradient orbs.

packs.title: Onboarding Walkthrough
packs.description: Multi-step onboarding wizard with 4-step progress indicator (numbered/steps), animated transitions, workspace setup form, use case preference selection (6 options), feature highlights, and back/skip/finish navigation.

packs.title: Dropdowns & Menus
packs.description: 4 menu patterns: click-triggered dropdown with shortcuts and dividers, two-column mega menu with sections, right-click context menu, and custom select dropdowns.

packs.title: Carousels & Sliders
packs.description: 3 slider patterns: multi-card feature carousel with dot navigation and prev/next buttons, testimonial rotator with auto-play and author avatars, and tabbed content slider with 4 panels.

packs.title: Avatars & Badges
packs.description: Avatar sizes (sm/default/lg/xl), status indicators (online/away/DND/offline), avatar groups with overflow count, badge variants (6 colors), badge sizes, dot badges, icon badges, and number counter badges.

packs.title: Timeline Components
packs.description: 4 timeline patterns: vertical project history with colored dots and dates, activity feed with icons and timestamps, milestone tracker with progress fill, and horizontal sprint timeline.

packs.title: Wave Dividers
packs.description: 6 SVG section dividers: smooth wave, sharp angle/chevron, organic curve/blob, layered hills (3 overlapping), arrow/chevron split, and rounded split. Each shown in context between colored sections with usage guide.

packs.title: Tech Icons
packs.description: 16 SVG tech stack icons on 24×24 grid: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, Vue, Svelte, Node.js, Python, Docker, Git, GitHub, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, AWS, Redis, Figma, VS Code. Organized by category (Frontend, Backend, Database, Design) with usage guide.

packs.title: Terms of Service & Privacy
packs.description: Legal pages with tabbed Terms of Service and Privacy Policy panels. Clean editorial layout with DM Serif Display headings, sections covering acceptance, accounts, intellectual property, data collection, cookies, and user rights.

packs.title: Changelog — Release Notes
packs.description: Release notes page with version timeline (major/minor/patch), color-coded dots, filter pills by release type, and emoji-labelled change entries with code references. JetBrains Mono for version numbers.

packs.title: System Status Page
packs.description: Service status dashboard with all-good/issues/down badge, 6 monitored services with status indicators, recent incident log with resolved/monitoring labels, and 90-day uptime history bar chart.

packs.title: Documentation Template
packs.description: Full documentation site with sticky sidebar navigation, search input, 4 grouped sections (Getting Started, Core Concepts, Guides, API Reference), breadcrumbs, table of contents, code blocks, and info/warning/tip callouts.

packs.title: Tooltips & Popovers
packs.description: Tooltips in 4 positions (top/bottom/left/right) with arrow indicators, rich tooltips with title and description on hover, keyboard shortcut tooltips on colored buttons, click-to-open notification popover with message list, profile popover card, and settings context popover.

packs.title: Kanban Board
packs.description: 4-column kanban board (To Do, In Progress, Review, Done) with color-coded column headers, task cards with feature/bug/design/dev/docs labels, high/medium/low priority badges, avatar assignees, and sprint header with task count.

packs.title: Chat Messages
packs.description: Real-time chat UI with incoming/outgoing message bubbles, avatar senders, code snippets in messages, file attachment preview, typing indicator with animated dots, chat input with send and attach buttons, and direct message thread sidebar with unread indicators.

packs.title: Calendar Widget
packs.description: Interactive calendar with month navigation (prev/next buttons, today button), 6-week grid with event dots and today highlighting, upcoming events list with color-coded bars and tags, weekly overview with event counts, and date range picker with stats cards.

packs.title: Charts & Data Visualization
packs.description: Zero-dependency HTML/CSS/SVG charts: grouped bar chart with dual series, SVG line chart with gradient area fill and data dots, conic-gradient donut chart with legend, progress bars with colored fills, and stat cards with change indicators.

packs.title: Social Media Icons
packs.description: 14 SVG brand icons for social media platforms on 24×24 grid: X/Twitter, GitHub, LinkedIn, Discord, Slack, YouTube, Instagram (gradient), Telegram, WhatsApp, TikTok, Reddit, Stack Overflow, Dev.to, Product Hunt, Dribbble. Brand colors, organized by category.
